options.name: -detailed
options.description: Print detailed report of layer constraints usage.

options.name: -file
options.description: Specify the name of the report that will be generated.

options.name: -summary
options.description: Print summary report of layer constraints usage.

options.name: -svr
options.description: Report pins with stack via rule constraints

options.name: -svrOnly
options.description: Only report pins with stack via rule constraints

options.name: -threshold
options.description: Maximum routing adherence for a net to be included in detailed report (default : 80 which means only nets with adherence < 80 % will be included in detailed report).

options.name: -timing
options.description: Extract timing information for nets analyzed.
